title: T-034 — UI: Brief list + Brief detail page (brief_list, brief_detail)
prompt:
# T-034 — Brief list + detail UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §9.2 + UX brief_list + brief_detail
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx:7-82 (brief_list) + 84-231 (brief_detail)

## Goal
Server Component pages /(npd)/brief and /(npd)/brief/[briefId] rendering list + Section A/B form using shadcn primitives matching prototypes 1:1; detail uses RHF + saveBriefDraft action.

## Implementation contract
List page: filters (status), columns (dev_code, status, template, created_at, owner), Convert CTA visible for complete briefs. Detail page: collapsible sections A and B, multi_component component rows with add/remove, summary row weight diff badge. Translation notes: window.NPD_BRIEFS → Drizzle query.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/[briefId]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/_components/brief-list-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/_components/brief-detail-form.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/_components/__tests__/brief-list-table.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/_components/__tests__/brief-detail-form.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given brief list renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx:7-82 (brief_list), then it has the same 5 columns in same order, status filter chips region, and uses shadcn Table+Badge primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given brief detail renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx:84-231 (brief_detail), then Section A has 13 fields and Section B 7 explicit fields + packaging_ext JSONB (rendered as KeyValue list), with shadcn Form+Card+Input — verified by RTL parity checklist
3. Given user adds a component row, when summary weight delta exceeds tolerance, then a destructive Badge 'Weight mismatch' renders inline

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests for list parity, detail parity, weight mismatch badge
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test brief-list-table brief-detail-form'

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement Convert modal UI here (T-035)
- Do not bypass saveBriefDraft
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim

Do not commit C21-C37 placeholder labels
